title: Four-month India Administrative Location Refresh Cadence Policy
refresh_steps: Fetch latest source metadata from approved government source registry.
Stage additions, renames, retirements and code changes as candidates.
Generate diff report and validation report.

failure_policy.fetch_failure: Keep last approved data active and create refresh_failure_review_required record.
failure_policy.schema_change: Block import and require manual schema review.
failure_policy.large_unexpected_change: Block promotion and require manual review.
